headline: Good morning — here's your week ahead.
tldr: ElevenLabs via Jamie: Lauren needs your project samples — reply this week (Emails #1)
Review EasyJet overdue since yesterday — clear it today (To-dos #1)
Dinner with Don + Visa Tuesday has no location confirmed (Calendar #5)
Potential NYC starts Friday — confirm it's happening and book travel if so (Calendar #8)
Three birthdays: Marc vM Tue, Caroline Fri, Roger and Chechi Sat (Calendar #3, #9, #10, #11)
Saturday Shabbat has no location confirmed (Calendar #13)
Wednesday entirely clear — no plans at all (Calendar)
intro: ElevenLabs has asked for your project portfolio via Jamie — Lauren Rothwell is waiting on samples of your work and Jamie has explicitly looped you in (Emails #1, urgent). Review EasyJet is one day overdue, and Dinner with Don + Visa on Tuesday evening has no location confirmed. Wednesday is completely clear; Potential NYC starts Friday — confirm whether it's going ahead and book if so.
stats: 2 open to-dos · 13 events this week · 1 unread email (1 urgent)
